ham: Hey Ravi, a reminder that your SIP of Rs. 5,000 for ABC Mutual Fund will be deducted today from your linked account. Please ensure sufficient balance. Happy investing! - ABC Investments
spam: URGENT: Aapka courier (track no 12345) deliver nahi hua. Click <URL> to reschedule ya Rs.150 pay kare re-delivery ke liye. HURRY, varna cancel ho jayega.
